notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes visible events (Fang Yuan attacking, releasing subordinates, entering Corpse City) and entity relations, but does not contain direct textual evidence of private knowledge, secret plans, or future-known information that is source-backed. The events are mostly public actions. No hidden fact candidate can be reliably extracted from the provided pointers without speculation or extrapolation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily describes individual-level conflicts between Fang Yuan and two individuals (Cuibo Xianzi and Sanyu Tongren). Although Cuibo Xianzi is noted as the third concubine of Qianbian Laozu, this is a tangential relation and the seed does not establish any collective faction/group stake or pressure. The conflict is personal (Fang Yuan wants to devour their immortal apertures), not a faction-level pressure. No named collective actor (clan, faction, family, hall, shop, organization) has a concrete stake in the seed facts. Rejecting per rules.
IF export filter quarantined 7 legacy old-schema branches.
